rationale: No conflict. Educ. Code §21.605 governs selection of program participants via applications; it is unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: Sec. 21.605. SELECTION OF PARTICIPANTS. (a) The agency shall select persons to participate in the program on the basis of applications submitted to the agency.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no overlap in subject matter.
